query_text: Esophageal cancer (squamous cell or adenocarcinoma), FFPE with matched plasma. TNM staged, treatment-naive or pre-neoadjuvant. Histology subtype documented. N >= 30 paired.

parsed.histology_required: squamous cell carcinoma OR adenocarcinoma — histotype must be documented
parsed.assay_context: Esophageal cancer liquid biopsy development — ctDNA panel validation with matched FFPE for variant confirmation
